description: Staff-engineer level TDD implementation ensuring the frontend receives and displays blockchain data correctly. Uses TypeScript as a feature for compile-time correctness. Creates robust type boundaries between indexer schema, GraphQL queries, repository layer, and UI components. Every boundary is tested with type-safe contracts.

userStories.title: Create shared type definitions for indexer schema
userStories.description: Define TypeScript types that mirror the Ponder schema exactly, serving as the source of truth.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `indexer/src/types/schema.ts` with types for all aggregate tables (assets, orders, journeys)
Types use snake_case to match Ponder column names exactly
Include JSDoc comments documenting each field's meaning and source event

userStories.title: Create shared type definitions for nodes aggregate
userStories.description: Define TypeScript types for the nodes aggregate table.
acceptanceCriteria: Fields: id (hex), owner (hex), address_name (text), lat (text), lng (text), valid_node (boolean), status (text), block_number, block_timestamp, transaction_hash

userStories.title: Create shared type definitions for node_assets aggregate
userStories.description: Define TypeScript types for the node_assets aggregate table.
acceptanceCriteria: Fields: id (text), node (hex), token (hex), token_id (bigint), price (bigint), capacity (bigint), block_number, block_timestamp, transaction_hash

userStories.title: Add nodes aggregate table to generator
userStories.description: Add nodes table definition to generateEntityTables() in scripts/generate-indexer.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'nodes' table with columns matching PonderNode type

userStories.title: Add node_assets aggregate table to generator
userStories.description: Add node_assets table definition to generateEntityTables() in scripts/generate-indexer.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'node_assets' table with columns matching PonderNodeAsset type

userStories.title: Extend journeys table with missing frontend fields
userStories.description: Add sender, receiver, driver, order_id, created_at fields to journeys table.
acceptanceCriteria: Add: sender (hex), receiver (hex), driver (hex), order_id (hex), start_name (text), end_name (text), created_at (bigint)
Add indexes on sender, receiver, driver, order_id

userStories.title: Extend orders table with missing frontend fields
userStories.description: Add location fields, nodes array, created_at, updated_at to orders table.
acceptanceCriteria: Add: start_location_lat (text), start_location_lng (text), end_location_lat (text), end_location_lng (text), start_name (text), end_name (text), nodes (text - JSON), created_at (bigint), updated_at (bigint)

userStories.title: Extend assets table with missing frontend fields
userStories.description: Add account, amount fields to assets table.

userStories.title: Add nodes event mappings to EVENT_TO_AGGREGATE_MAPPING
userStories.description: Map node registration and update events to nodes aggregate table.
acceptanceCriteria: Add mapping for Diamond:NodeRegistered -> nodes insert
Add mapping for Diamond:NodeDeactivated -> nodes update (status)
Add mapping for Diamond:NodeUpdated -> nodes update
Add mapping for Diamond:UpdateLocation -> nodes update (lat, lng, address_name)
Add mapping for Diamond:UpdateStatus -> nodes update (status)

userStories.title: Add node_assets event mappings to EVENT_TO_AGGREGATE_MAPPING
userStories.description: Map node asset events to node_assets aggregate table.
acceptanceCriteria: Add mapping for Diamond:SupportedAssetAdded -> node_assets insert
Add mapping for Diamond:TokensDepositedToNode -> node_assets update (capacity increment)
Add mapping for Diamond:TokensWithdrawnFromNode -> node_assets update (capacity decrement)

userStories.title: Update journeys event mappings with extended fields
userStories.description: Update LogisticsOrderCreated mapping to populate sender, receiver, order_id.
acceptanceCriteria: Update Diamond:LogisticsOrderCreated mapping to include sender, receiver from event

userStories.title: Create type-safe GraphQL response types
userStories.description: Create TypeScript types for GraphQL responses that match Ponder's pluralized table names.
acceptanceCriteria: Types use camelCase field names (Ponder auto-converts snake_case to camelCase in GraphQL)

userStories.title: Create type-safe domain mappers
userStories.description: Create pure functions that convert GraphQL responses to domain types with full type safety.
acceptanceCriteria: All functions have explicit return types, no 'any'

userStories.title: Create type-safe GraphQL query builder
userStories.description: Create a typed query builder that ensures query field names match schema.
acceptanceCriteria: Options types enforce valid field names for where clauses

userStories.title: Write unit test for asset mapper
userStories.description: TDD: Test that mapGraphQLAssetToDomain correctly transforms data.
acceptanceCriteria: Test converts snake_case GraphQL response to camelCase domain type
Test handles null/undefined optional fields gracefully
Test tokenId is converted from string to bigint correctly

userStories.title: Write unit test for order mapper
userStories.description: TDD: Test that mapGraphQLOrderToDomain correctly transforms data.
acceptanceCriteria: Test converts status text to OrderStatus enum
Test location fields are mapped correctly
Test nodes JSON array is parsed

userStories.title: Write unit test for journey mapper
userStories.description: TDD: Test that mapGraphQLJourneyToDomain correctly transforms data.
acceptanceCriteria: Test converts numeric status to JourneyStatus enum
Test bounty/eta are converted to bigint
Test parcelData is constructed from location fields

userStories.title: Write unit test for node mapper
userStories.description: TDD: Test that mapGraphQLNodeToDomain correctly transforms data.
acceptanceCriteria: Test location object is constructed correctly

userStories.title: Update graph-queries.ts to use snake_case field names
userStories.description: Update frontend GraphQL queries to match Ponder schema field names.
acceptanceCriteria: Change all camelCase fields to snake_case (tokenId -> token_id, etc.)
Verify queries match PonderAsset, PonderOrder, PonderJourney types

userStories.title: Update repositories to use type-safe mappers
userStories.description: Update OrdersRepository to use new typed mappers.
acceptanceCriteria: Import and use mapGraphQLOrderToDomain for all order queries
Import and use mapGraphQLJourneyToDomain for all journey queries

userStories.title: Update NodeRepository to use type-safe mappers
userStories.description: Update NodeRepository to use new typed mappers.
acceptanceCriteria: Import and use mapGraphQLNodeToDomain for all node queries
Import and use mapGraphQLAssetToDomain for asset queries

userStories.title: Write smoke test for nodes GraphQL query
userStories.description: Integration test that nodes aggregate table is queryable.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify response has shape: { nodess: { items: [...] } }
Verify items have expected fields: id, owner, address_name, lat, lng, valid_node, status

userStories.title: Write smoke test for node_assets GraphQL query
userStories.description: Integration test that node_assets aggregate table is queryable.
acceptanceCriteria: Test queries with node filter: `nodeAssetss(where: { node: $address })`
Verify items have expected fields: id, node, token, token_id, price, capacity

userStories.title: Write smoke test for assets GraphQL query
userStories.description: Integration test that assets aggregate table is queryable.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify response has shape: { assetss: { items: [...] } }
Verify items have fields: id, name, asset_class, class_name, hash, account

userStories.title: Write smoke test for orders GraphQL query
userStories.description: Integration test that orders aggregate table is queryable.
acceptanceCriteria: Test queries with buyer filter: `orderss(where: { buyer: $address })`
Verify items have fields: id, buyer, seller, token, token_id, price, status

userStories.title: Write smoke test for journeys GraphQL query
userStories.description: Integration test that journeys aggregate table is queryable.
acceptanceCriteria: Test queries with sender filter: `journeyss(where: { sender: $address })`
Verify items have fields: id, sender, receiver, driver, status, bounty, order_id

userStories.title: Write E2E test: Customer creates order, indexer reflects it
userStories.description: End-to-end test that order creation on-chain appears in indexer.
acceptanceCriteria: Test waits for indexer to sync (poll with timeout)
Test queries orderss(where: { id: $orderId }) and verifies data matches
Verify buyer, seller, token, price, status fields are correct

userStories.title: Write E2E test: Driver accepts journey, indexer reflects status
userStories.description: End-to-end test that journey status updates appear in indexer.
acceptanceCriteria: Test waits for indexer to sync
Test queries journeyss(where: { id: $journeyId }) and verifies status=1 (Accepted)

userStories.title: Write E2E test: Node registers, appears in indexer
userStories.description: End-to-end test that node registration appears in indexer.
acceptanceCriteria: Test registers node via NodeService (if available) or direct contract call
Test waits for indexer to sync
Test queries nodess(where: { owner: $address }) and verifies node appears
Verify owner, address_name, lat, lng, valid_node fields are correct

userStories.title: Write E2E test: Asset minted, appears in indexer
userStories.description: End-to-end test that asset minting appears in indexer.
acceptanceCriteria: Test mints asset via AuraAsset contract or mock event
Test waits for indexer to sync
Test queries assetss(where: { id: $tokenId }) and verifies asset appears
Verify name, asset_class, class_name, hash fields are correct

userStories.title: Write E2E test: CLOB order placed, status updates correctly
userStories.description: End-to-end test that CLOB order lifecycle is tracked.
acceptanceCriteria: Test places limit order via CLOBService.placeLimitOrder()
Test waits for indexer to sync
Test queries orderss and verifies status='OPEN'

userStories.title: Create React hook type tests
userStories.description: TypeScript compile-time tests ensuring hooks return correct types.
acceptanceCriteria: Use vitest's expectTypeOf to verify useOrderBook returns OrderBook type

userStories.title: Create repository type tests
userStories.description: TypeScript compile-time tests ensuring repositories match interfaces.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify all method signatures match interface definitions

userStories.title: Create boundary contract tests for indexer-to-frontend
userStories.description: Tests that verify the contract between indexer schema and frontend expectations.
acceptanceCriteria: Test that every field in GET_ALL_ASSETS query exists in PonderAsset type
Test that every field in GET_ORDERS_BY_BUYER query exists in PonderOrder type
Test that every field in GET_JOURNEYS_BY_SENDER query exists in PonderJourney type
Use schema introspection or type checking

userStories.title: Regenerate all handlers and run full test suite
userStories.description: Final regeneration and comprehensive test run.
acceptanceCriteria: Run `cd indexer && npm test -- --grep smoke` passes (smoke tests)

userStories.title: Run full E2E test suite against local chain
userStories.description: Run all E2E tests to verify complete data flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Start local Hardhat node: `npx hardhat node`
Deploy contracts: `npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network localhost`
Start local indexer: `cd indexer && npm run dev`
All order, journey, node, asset indexing tests pass

userStories.title: Document type boundaries in AGENTS.md
userStories.description: Add documentation about the type-safe data pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: Update `AGENTS.md` with section on Type Boundaries
Document: Indexer Schema Types -> GraphQL Response Types -> Domain Types -> UI Props
Document mapper function locations and naming conventions
Document how to add new aggregate tables with full type safety
Include example of adding a new entity end-to-end
